violations.text: The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. -food choppers, -knives, -spoons, -food processor blades. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed items in 3 bay to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Diced tomatoes were observed over filled in a cold hold well with the top tomatoes at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC informed not to over stack items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
The hot hold unit located in the front service area was not in good repair (observed broken gasket). New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the knife rack and can opener base have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The floors throughout the facility and walls near 3 bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

Various prepared foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
Beef was observed stored on the floor in the preparation area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

At the time of inspection dirty dishes were being stored with clean dishes on shelving in ware washing area. PIC informed and moved to corresponding location. All dishes were washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
Shelving located in the dishwasher area was observed peeling and flaking. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
